allow: Bash(npx ctx7@latest library ArangoDB "ArangoDB v4 release status and vector index availability in 3.x stable releases")
Bash(npx ctx7@latest docs /arangodb/arangodb "ArangoDB version 4 release timeline vector index availability stable version current major version 3.12 3.13")
Bash(npx ctx7@latest docs /arangodb/arangodb "vector index 3.12 experimental dimension metric APPROX_NEAR_COSINE example body POST _api/index")

Bash(python3 -c 'import json; print\(json.dumps\({"query":"FOR d IN smoke_vec SORT APPROX_NEAR_COSINE\(d.embedding, @q\) DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN {id: d._id, sim: APPROX_NEAR_COSINE\(d.embedding, @q\)}","bindVars":{"q":[0.1]*768}}\)\)')

Bash(python3 -c 'import json; print\(json.dumps\({"query":"FOR d IN smoke_vec SORT APPROX_NEAR_COSINE\(d.embedding, @q\) DESC LIMIT 5 OPTIONS { useExperimentalVectorIndex: true } RETURN {id: d._id, sim: APPROX_NEAR_COSINE\(d.embedding, @q\)}","bindVars":{"q":[0.1]*768}}\)\)')
Bash(python3 -c 'import json; print\(json.dumps\({"query":"FOR d IN smoke_vec SORT APPROX_NEAR_COSINE\(d.embedding, @q\) DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN d._id","bindVars":{"q":[0.1]*768}}\)\)')

Bash(python3 -c 'import json; print\(json.dumps\({"query":"FOR d IN smoke_vec LET sim = APPROX_NEAR_COSINE\(d.embedding, @q\) SORT sim DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN {id: d._id, sim: sim}","bindVars":{"q":[0.1]*768}}\)\)')
Bash(npx ctx7@latest library Podman "podman compose vs quadlet vs pod kube for local dev orchestration 2026")
Bash(npx ctx7@latest docs /containers/podman "quadlet vs podman-compose vs play kube for local development orchestration multiple services restart policy systemd user units")
Bash(ARANGO_TEST_RUN=1 ARANGO_TEST_URL=http://localhost:8529 ARANGO_TEST_USER=root ARANGO_TEST_PASS=password dotnet test dais-bridge.tests/dais-bridge.tests.csproj --nologo)
